${bioHighlighted ? `<p class=\"bio\">${bioHighlighted}</p>` : \"\"}\n        <div class=\"user-actions\">\n          <a href=\"${user.profile_url}\" aria-label=\"View read-only listing for ${user.display_name}\">View Listing</a>\n        </div>\n      </article>\n    `;\n  }\n\n  function buildUserCard(user, query, tab) {\n    const displayNameHighlighted = highlightMatch(\n      user.display_name || user.primary_username,\n      query,\n    );\n    const usernameHighlighted = highlightMatch(user.primary_username, query);\n    const bioHighlighted = user.bio ? highlightMatch(user.bio, query) : \"\";\n\n    if (user.is_public_record || user.is_globaleaks || user.is_securedrop) {\n      return buildAutomatedListingCard(user, query, tab);\n    }\n\n    const isVerified = user.is_verified ? \"Verified\" : \"\";\n    const userType = user.is_admin ? `${isVerified} admin user` : `${isVerified} User`;\n    const badges = buildBadges(user, tab);\n\n    return `\n      <article class=\"user\" aria-label=\"${userType}, Display name:${user.display_name || user.primary_username}, Username: ${user.primary_username}, Bio: ${user.bio || \"No bio\"}\">\n        <h3>${displayNameHighlighted}</h3>\n        <p class=\"meta\">@${usernameHighlighted}</p>\n        ${badges ? `<div class=\"badgeContainer\">${badges}</div>` : \"\"}\n        ${bioHighlighted ? `<p profile\">View Profile</a>\n        </div>\n      </article>\n    `;\n  }\n\n  function appendSection(panel, label, users, query, tab) {\n    if (!users.length) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (label) {\n      const sectionLabel = document.createElement(\"p\");\n      sectionLabel.className = \"label searchLabel\";\n      sectionLabel.textContent = label;\n      panel.appendChild(sectionLabel);\n    }\n\n    const userListContainer = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    userListContainer.className = \"user-list\";\n    userListContainer.innerHTML = users.map((user) => buildUserCard(user, query, tab)).join(\"\");\n    panel.appendChild(userListContainer);\n  }\n\n  function renderPanelContent(\n    panel,\n    users,\n    query,\n    tab,\n    {     \"beforeend\",\n          '<p class=\"empty-message\"><span class=\"emoji-message\">🫥</span><br>No users found.</p>',\n        );\n      }\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const realUsers = users.filter(\n      (user) => !user.is_public_record && !user.is_globaleaks && !user.is_securedrop,\n    );\n    const withPgp = realUsers.filter((user) => user.has_pgp_key);\n    const infoOnly = realUsers.filter((user) => !user.has_pgp_key);\n\n    if (tab === \"all\") {\n      appendSection(panel, \"\", sortedByDisplayName(users), query, tab);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (tab === \"\", users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function displayUsers(users, query) {\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const tab = activeTabName();\n    if (!panel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, users, query, tab);\n  }\n\n  function buildDefaultPanelMarkup(tab) {\n    const panel = document.createElement(\"div\");\n    const introMarkup = tab === \"public-records\" ? publicRecordsIntroMarkup : \"\";\n    const showEmptyMessage = tab !== \"public-records\";\n\n    renderPanelContent(panel, filterUsers(\"\", tab), \"\", tab, {\n      introMarkup,\n      showEmptyMessage,\n    });\n\n    return panel.innerHTML;\n  }\n\n  function refreshInitialMarkup() {\n    if (document.getElementById(\"public-records\")) {\n      initialMarkup.set(\"public-records\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\"public-records\"));\n    }\n\n    if (document.getElementById(\"all\")) {\n      initialMarkup.set(\"all\", buildDefaultPanelMarkup(\"all\"));\n    }\n  }\n\n  function handleSearchInput() {\n    const query = searchInput.value.trim();\n    const panel = activePanel();\n    const currentScopeLabel = scopeLabel();\n    const hasQuery = query.length > 0;\n\n    if (clearIcon) {\n      clearIcon.style.visibility = hasQuery ? \"visible\" : \"hidden\";\n      clearIcon.hidden = !hasQuery;\n      clearIcon.setAttribute(\"aria-hidden\", hasQuery ? \"false\" : \"true\");\n    }\n\n    if (query.length === 0) {\n      if (panel && initialMarkup.has(panel.id)) {\n        panel.innerHTML = initialMarkup.get(panel.id);\n      }\n      if (hasRenderedSearch) {\n        setSearchStatus(`Showing all ${currentScopeLabel}.`);\n      }\n      hasRenderedSearch = false;\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const filteredUsers = filterUsers(query);\n    displayUsers(filteredUsers, query);\n    setSearchStatus(\n      filteredUsers.length === 1\n        ? `Found 1 ${currentScopeLabel.slice(0, -1)} matching \"${query}\".`\n        : `Found ${filteredUsers.length} ${currentScopeLabel} matching \"${query}\".`,\n    );\n    hasRenderedSearch = true;\n  }\n\n  function buildAttorneyFilterSearch() {\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\n    const country = attorneyCountryFilter?.value.trim() || \"\";\n    const region = attorneyRegionFilter?.value.trim() || \"\";\n\n    if (country) {\n      params.set(\"country\", country);\n    } else {\n      params.delete(\"country\");\n    }\n\n    if (region) {\n      params.set(\"region\", region);\n    } else {\n      params.delete(\"region\");\n    }\n\n    const nextSearch = params.toString();\n    return nextSearch ? `?${nextSearch}` : \"\";\n  }\n\n  function applyAttorneyFiltersFromSearch(search) {\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const params = new URLSearchParams(search);\n    attorneyCountryFilter.value = params.get(\"country\") || \"\";\n    attorneyRegionFilter.value = params.get(\"region\") || \"\";\n    if (!attorneyCountryFilter.value && attorneyRegionFilter.value) {\n      attorneyCountryFilter.value = inferredCountryForRegionCode(attorneyRegionFilter.value);\n    }\n    updateAttorneyCountryLabels();\n    updateAttorneyRegionOptions();\n\n    if (attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      attorneyFiltersPanel.hidden = !(attorneyCountryFilter.value || attorneyRegionFilter.value);\n      updateAttorneyFiltersToggle();\n      updateAttorneyFiltersClearVisibility();\n    }\n  }\n\n  function setAttorneyFiltersLoadingState(isLoading) {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    attorneyFiltersLoading = isLoading;\n    attorneyFiltersPanel.setAttribute(\"aria-busy\", isLoading ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n\n    if (attorneyCountryFilter) {\n      attorneyCountryFilter.disabled = isLoading;\n    }\n\n    if (attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      const disabledByCountry = attorneyRegionFilter.dataset.disabledByCountry === \"true\";\n      attorneyRegionFilter.disabled = isLoading || disabledByCountry;\n    }\n\n    const resetLink = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\"a\");\n    if (resetLink) {\n      resetLink.setAttribute(\"aria-disabled\", isLoading ? \"true\" : \"false\");\n      resetLink.tabIndex = isLoading ? -1 : 0;\n    }\n  }\n\n  function updateAttorneyFiltersClearVisibility() {\n    if (!attorneyFiltersPanel || !attorneyCountryFilter || !attorneyRegionFilter) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const resetActions = attorneyFiltersPanel.querySelector(\"#attorney-filters-actions\");\n    if (!resetActions) {\n      return;\n    }\n\n    resetActions.hidden = attorneyCountryFilter.value;\n    const showSelectedCount = attorneyCountryFilter.dataset.showSelectedCount === \"true\";\n\n    Array.from(attorneyCountryFilter.options).forEach((option) => {\n inferredCountryForRegionCode(regionCode) {\n    if (!regionCode) {\n      return \"\";\n    }\n\n    const normalizedRegionCode = regionCode.trim().toLowerCase();\n    const regionsByCountry =\n      attorneyFilterMetadata.regions && typeof attorneyFilterMetadata.regions === \"object\"\n        ? attorneyFilterMetadata.regions\n        : {};\n\n    for (const [countryName, countryRegions] of     def _exec_single_context(
        self,
        dialect: Dialect,
        context: ExecutionContext,
        statement: Union[str, Compiled],
        parameters: Optional[_AnyMultiExecuteParams],
    ) -> CursorResult[Any]:
        """continue the _execute_context() method for a single DBAPI
        cursor.execute() or cursor.executemany() call.
    
        """
        if dialect.bind_typing is BindTyping.SETINPUTSIZES:
            generic_setinputsizes = context._prepare_set_input_sizes()
    
            if generic_setinputsizes:
                try:
                    dialect.do_set_input_sizes(
                        context.cursor, generic_setinputsizes, context
                    )
                except BaseException as e:
                    self._handle_dbapi_exception(
                        e, str(statement), parameters, None, context
                    )
    
        cursor, str_statement, parameters = (
            context.cursor,
            context.statement,
            context.parameters,
        )
    
        effective_parameters: Optional[_AnyExecuteParams]
    
        if not context.executemany:
            effective_parameters = parameters[0]
        else:
            effective_parameters = parameters
    
        if self._has_events or self.engine._has_events:
            for fn in self.dispatch.before_cursor_execute:
                str_statement, effective_parameters = fn(
                    self,
                    cursor,
                    str_statement,
                    effective_parameters,
                    context,
                    context.executemany,
                )
    
        if self._echo:
            self._log_info(str_statement)
    
            stats = context._get_cache_stats()
    
            if not self.engine.hide_parameters:
                self._log_info(
                    "[%s] %r",
                    stats,
                    sql_util._repr_params(
                        effective_parameters,
                        batches=10,
                        ismulti=context.executemany,
                    ),
                )
            else:
                self._log_info(
                    "[%s] [SQL parameters hidden due to hide_parameters=True]",
                    stats,
                )
    
        evt_handled: bool = False
        try:
            if context.execute_style is ExecuteStyle.EXECUTEMANY:
                effective_parameters = cast(
                    "_CoreMultiExecuteParams", effective_parameters
                )
                if self.dialect._has_events:
                    for fn in self.dialect.dispatch.do_executemany:
                        if fn(
                            cursor,
                            str_statement,
                            effective_parameters,
                            context,
                        ):
                            evt_handled = True
                            break
                if not evt_handled:
                    self.dialect.do_executemany(
                        cursor,
                        str_statement,
                        effective_parameters,
                        context,
                    )
            elif not effective_parameters and context.no_parameters:
                if self.dialect._has_events:
                    for fn in self.dialect.dispatch.do_execute_no_params:
                        if fn(cursor, str_statement, context):
                            evt_handled = True
                            break
                if not evt_handled:
                    self.dialect.do_execute_no_params(
                        cursor, str_statement, context
                    )
            else:
                effective_parameters = cast(
                    "_CoreSingleExecuteParams", effective_parameters
                )
                if self.dialect._has_events:
                    for fn in self.dialect.dispatch.do_execute:

                            cursor,
                            str_statement,
                            effective_parameters,
                            context,
                        ):

                            break

                        cursor, str_statement, effective_parameters, context
                    )

    def _exec_single_context(
        self,
        dialect: Dialect,
        context: ExecutionContext,
        statement: Union[str, Compiled],
        parameters: Optional[_AnyMultiExecuteParams],
    ) -> CursorResult[Any]:
        """continue the _execute_context() method for a single DBAPI
        cursor.execute() or cursor.executemany() call.
    
        """
        if dialect.bind_typing is BindTyping.SETINPUTSIZES:
            generic_setinputsizes = context._prepare_set_input_sizes()
    
            if generic_setinputsizes:
                try:
                    dialect.do_set_input_sizes(
                        context.cursor, generic_setinputsizes, context
                    )
                except BaseException as e:
                    self._handle_dbapi_exception(
                        e, str(statement), parameters, None, context
                    )
    
        cursor, str_statement, parameters = (
            context.cursor,
            context.statement,
            context.parameters,
        )
    
        effective_parameters: Optional[_AnyExecuteParams]
    
        if not context.executemany:
            effective_parameters = parameters[0]
        else:
            effective_parameters = parameters
    
        if self._has_events or self.engine._has_events:
            for fn in self.dispatch.before_cursor_execute:
                str_statement, effective_parameters = fn(
                    self,
                    cursor,
                    str_statement,
                    effective_parameters,
                    context,
                    context.executemany,
                )
    
        if self._echo:
            self._log_info(str_statement)
    
            stats = context._get_cache_stats()
    
            if not self.engine.hide_parameters:
                self._log_info(
                    "[%s] %r",
                    stats,
                    sql_util._repr_params(
                        effective_parameters,
                        batches=10,
                        ismulti=context.executemany,
                    ),
                )
            else:
                self._log_info(
                    "[%s] [SQL parameters hidden due to hide_parameters=True]",
                    stats,
                )
    
        evt_handled: bool = False
        try:
            if context.execute_style is ExecuteStyle.EXECUTEMANY:
                effective_parameters = cast(
                    "_CoreMultiExecuteParams", effective_parameters
                )
                if self.dialect._has_events:
                    for fn in self.dialect.dispatch.do_executemany:
                        if fn(
                            cursor,
                            str_statement,
                            effective_parameters,
                            context,
                        ):
                            evt_handled = True
                            break
                if not evt_handled:
                    self.dialect.do_executemany(
                        cursor,
                        str_statement,
                        effective_parameters,
                        context,
                    )
            elif not effective_parameters and context.no_parameters:
                if self.dialect._has_events:
                    for fn in self.dialect.dispatch.do_execute_no_params:
                        if fn(cursor, str_statement, context):
                            evt_handled = True
                            break
                if not evt_handled:
                    self.dialect.do_execute_no_params(
                        cursor, str_statement, context
                    )
            else:
                effective_parameters = cast(
                    "_CoreSingleExecuteParams", effective_parameters
                )
                if self.dialect._has_events:
                    for fn in self.dialect.dispatch.do_execute:
                        if fn(
                            cursor,
                            str_statement,
                            effective_parameters,
                            context,
                        ):
                            evt_handled = True
                            break
                if not evt_handled:
>                   self.dialect.do_execute(
                        cursor, str_statement, effective_parameters, context
                    )

    def execute(
        self,
        query: Query,
        params: Params | None = None,
        *,
        prepare: bool | None = None,

    ) -> Self:
        """

    def _exec_single_context(
        self,
        dialect: Dialect,
        context: ExecutionContext,
        statement: Union[str, Compiled],
        parameters: Optional[_AnyMultiExecuteParams],
    ) -> CursorResult[Any]:
        """continue the _execute_context() method for a single DBAPI
        cursor.execute() or cursor.executemany() call.
    
        """
        if dialect.bind_typing is BindTyping.SETINPUTSIZES:
            generic_setinputsizes = context._prepare_set_input_sizes()
    
            if generic_setinputsizes:
                try:
                    dialect.do_set_input_sizes(
                        context.cursor, generic_setinputsizes, context
                    )
                except BaseException as e:
                    self._handle_dbapi_exception(
                        e, str(statement), parameters, None, context
                    )
    
        cursor, str_statement, parameters = (
            context.cursor,
            context.statement,
            context.parameters,
        )
    
        effective_parameters: Optional[_AnyExecuteParams]
    
        if not context.executemany:
            effective_parameters = parameters[0]
        else:
            effective_parameters = parameters
    
        if self._has_events or self.engine._has_events:
            for fn in self.dispatch.before_cursor_execute:
                str_statement, effective_parameters = fn(
                    self,
                    cursor,
                    str_statement,
                    effective_parameters,
                    context,
                    context.executemany,
                )
    
        if self._echo:
            self._log_info(str_statement)
    
            stats = context._get_cache_stats()
    
            if not self.engine.hide_parameters:
                self._log_info(
                    "[%s] %r",
                    stats,
                    sql_util._repr_params(
                        effective_parameters,
                        batches=10,
                        ismulti=context.executemany,
                    ),
                )
            else:
                self._log_info(
                    "[%s] [SQL parameters hidden due to hide_parameters=True]",
                    stats,
                )
    
        evt_handled: bool = False
        try:
            if context.execute_style is ExecuteStyle.EXECUTEMANY:
                effective_parameters = cast(
                    "_CoreMultiExecuteParams", effective_parameters
                )
                if self.dialect._has_events:
                    for fn in self.dialect.dispatch.do_executemany:
                        if fn(
                            cursor,
                            str_statement,
                            effective_parameters,
                            context,
                        ):
                            evt_handled = True
                            break
                if not evt_handled:
                    self.dialect.do_executemany(
                        cursor,
                        str_statement,
                        effective_parameters,
                        context,
                    )
            elif not effective_parameters and context.no_parameters:

    def _exec_single_context(
        self,
        dialect: Dialect,
        context: ExecutionContext,
        statement: Union[str, Compiled],
        parameters: Optional[_AnyMultiExecuteParams],
    ) -> CursorResult[Any]:
        """continue the _execute_context() method for a single DBAPI
        cursor.execute() or cursor.executemany() call.
    
        """
        if dialect.bind_typing is BindTyping.SETINPUTSIZES:
            generic_setinputsizes = context._prepare_set_input_sizes()
    
            if generic_setinputsizes:
                try:
                    dialect.do_set_input_sizes(
                        context.cursor, generic_setinputsizes, context
                    )
                except BaseException as e:
                    self._handle_dbapi_exception(
                        e, str(statement), parameters, None, context
                    )
    
        cursor, str_statement, parameters = (
            context.cursor,
            context.statement,
            context.parameters,
        )
    
        effective_parameters: Optional[_AnyExecuteParams]
    
        if not context.executemany:
            effective_parameters = parameters[0]
        else:
            effective_parameters = parameters

                str_statement, effective_parameters = fn(
                    self,
                    cursor,
                    str_statement,
                    effective_parameters,
                    context,
                    context.executemany,
                )
    
        if self._echo:
            self._log_info(str_statement)
    
            stats = context._get_cache_stats()
    
            if not self.engine.hide_parameters:
                self._log_info(
                    "[%s] %r",
                    stats,
                    sql_util._repr_params(
                        effective_parameters,
                        batches=10,
                        ismulti=context.executemany,
                    ),
                )
            else:
                self._log_info(
                    "[%s] [SQL parameters hidden due to hide_parameters=True]",
                    stats,
                )

                    "_CoreMultiExecuteParams", effective_parameters
